name: analyze_media
description: Analyze a media file (video, audio, or image) with Gemini Flash. Ask questions, extract structured data, describe content.

input.description: Video, audio, or image file to analyze

output.description: Model response (plain text or JSON if --json-output)

params.name: json-output
params.description: Request structured JSON output from the model

params.name: out
params.description: Write response to file instead of stdout
